title: mariscus lentiginosus
intro: Mariscus lentiginosus, also known as Sensitive Fern, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Mariscus genus and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mariscus lentiginosus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Mariscus lentiginosus can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to make salves and poultices for topical application.
